summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned. The job is not a dedupe cluster, so open PRs are classified independently unless an exact security-sensitive linked ref must be routed.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with proof, no duplicate/superseded evidence, and merge/fix actions are disallowed in this plan job.
Open focused PR with unresolved mergeability/review state; not low-signal and not safely closeable in this inventory job.
Useful focused PR with proof but still requiring maintainer/review judgment and affected by a failing check in the artifact; no closure path is supported.
Maintainer-owned draft with broad scope and explicit maintainer decision state; no close, merge, or fix action is appropriate in this inventory shard.
Small focused PR but proof and checks are insufficient; not low-signal enough for closure under this job, and fix/merge actions are blocked.
Exact linked security-sensitive ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without blocking unrelated non-security PR classifications.
